meta.descriptionSchema: Each 'description' field is an array of content blocks. Each block has a 'type' of either 'paragraph' (a single prose block) or 'list' (a bullet/item list). Lists have an optional 'heading' and always have an 'items' array of strings.

summary.text: My first 4 years of commercial experience I used mostly PHP + MySQL/Postgres stack of technologies. In February of 2018 I started actively learning and practicing JavaScript, learning on the way NoSQL databases, ElasticSearch, RabbitMQ, Node.JS, Angular, React, Vue.

Starting from the October 2018 I completely switched to JS and worked as a Node.js/React developer as well as started developing a pet project using React, Node.JS/Express, GraphQL and Neo4j (GRAND stack).

In 2025 I started introducing myself to AI-powered development tools like Windsurf and Claude, which has significantly improved my productivity and coding efficiency. I now code using only spec-driven development approach -

At the moment I am looking for a job as a Senior Frontend or Fullstack JavaScript developer. I have an extensive experience in frontend development with the above-mentioned FE libraries/frameworks, Next.js and Prisma, with latest experience at Dell Technologies being Angular.
I can also work as a full-stack developer using JS/TS and Python, given some time to brush up on your particular choice of frameworks and DBs.

portfolio.name: didgibot.com
portfolio.description: Electronic document flow web app (personal project)

description.text: Purpose: keeping up-to-date with current FE/BE state of development.

description.heading: Projects:
items: Electronic document flow web app - https://didgibot.com.
Personal blog - https://blog.didgibot.com.
Personal blog admin panel - https://admin.blog.didgibot.com.

description.heading: Document Workflow project details:
items: Next.js repo - https://github.com/igokul1973/nextjs (partial public part).
Technologies used: React, Next.js, Typescript, Prism, MUI, MinIO and PostgreSQL.
Aspects of the projects include, among others - Internationalization, SSR, separate PDF/File service (see https://github.com/igokul1973/invoice-fileservice).
Deployment uses - multistage Dockerfile, Kubernetes, ArgoCD, Jenkins, DIND on VPS - necessary code can be shown on demand.
The project features, among others - Internationalization, SSR, separate PDF/File service (see https://github.com/igokul1973/invoice-fileservice).

description.heading: Personal Blog details:
items: FE Angular repo - https://github.com/igokul1973/blog.didgibot.com - open source
FE React repo - https://github.com/igokul1973/admin.blog.didgibot.com - open source
BE FastAPI/Python repo - https://github.com/igokul1973/admin.blog.didgibot.com - open source

Admin panel uses Editor.js WYSIWYG - https://editorjs.io/ and corresponding libraries for parsing and rendering content. The Angular version of Editor.js parser has been ported to Angular as there was no library alternative.
Technologies used: Angular, React, MUI, Angular Mateiral, Python, Strawberry, Apollo Client/GraphQL, Typescript, MinIO and PostgreSQL.
Some components and features were created using Spec-Driven Development approach - https://github.github.io/spec-kit/index.html

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Continued as a remote lead front-end developer (Vue.js/REST API) on one of the internal Dell projects based on microservice architecture.
Lead successful migration effort of the project's codebase from Vue.js v2 to Angular v.16 (with Module Federation/Micro-frontend capabilities) as interteam collaboration effort.
Delivered 80% of core features and supervised delivery of additional features outsourced to other teams.
Trained and onboarded new FE developers and collaborators.
Worked as a liaison/support between project's users and BE developers.
Occasional participation (10% of time) in backend development (Python/Django/Fast API).
Participated in sessions involving UX and architectural design decisions for new and existing features.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Remote front-end development (Vue.js) on one of the internal Dell projects.
R&D in micro-frontend paradigm (Angular) as inter-team collaboration effort.
Occasional participation in backend development (Python).
Working in one of the engineering scrum teams.

description.text: Outsourced to one of the largest Russian financial organizations.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Leading a team of 6 developers (4 front-end, 2 back-end), 1 system analyst and 2 testers (60% of time).
Remote front-end development of existing pilot program in remote education field (40% of time).
Project consists of 20 agile teams and is part of a larger educational project (common backend, multiple front-ends). As a team lead, facilitated communication between teams.
Fully agile methodology.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Front-end development for internal and external products.
Code reviews.
Analysis of tasks and business requirements.
Architectural solutions and selection of right technologies/tools for specific tasks.
Estimation of potential projects.
Interviews and evaluation of front-end developers.

description.text: Automotive project, Simulator department, as a Senior Frontend JavaScript Developer.
Project description: As one of the sub-projects/tools in Automotive Project, the Simulator is responsible for running simulated tests for autonomous driving functions leveraging the Web-based GUI.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Total rewrite of existing Simulator GUI in React.JS, given the existing functionality is developed using some obscure React.JS wrapper, underdeveloped and does not correspond to current business/technical requirements.
Development of new features and components.
Identifying and addressing performance bottlenecks.
Collaboration with frontend developers from another department for sharing UI components.
Collaboration with backend developers.

description.text: Worked as a Mid-level JavaScript Developer on a Los Angeles-based project: development of backend for a CRM system for gyms (coach-client interaction and progress tracking)
Developed on React/NodeJS/Hapi.js/PostgreSQL, initially alone, then in a team with another backend developer and two frontend developers.

Project description: Healthcare most widely adopted communication platform – uniquely modernizing care collaboration among doctors, nurses, patients, and care teams. It is the only solution that combines a consumer-like user experience for text, video, and voice communication with the serious security, privacy, and clinical workflow requirements that today's healthcare organizations demand. The project accelerates productivity, reduces costs, and improves patient outcomes.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Developing new features and components.
Creating the site pages (React.js).
Identifying and addressing performance bottlenecks.
Support and stabilization.
Collaboration with frontend developers.
Refactoring of existing code.
API expansion.
Creation of main sections of public part of the site.
Test coverage.
Team of 4 developers, QA and PM.
2-week sprints.
GitHub (GitFlow), Confluence, Jira.

description.heading: Achievements:
items: Initial set-up of frontend part in React.
Integration with ElasticSearch and AWS S3.
Dockerization of the project.

description.text: Outsourced as full-stack JS developer to US-based company with development office in Lithuania (payment processing company).
Traveled on business trip to Lithuania. Remote development of CRM for company's sales office in a team of 6 developers.
While waiting for another project, studied and reviewed GraphQL database - Neo4j, Apollo Client and Server, NodeJS. Practiced above-mentioned technologies on personal pet project.

Outsourced with a team of 10 developers to New York (USA)-based 'Real-estate for professionals network' startup (partially remote development - remote demos, code reviews, Skype/Slack communication with PM, BAs and tech lead).

items: Transfer of existing monolith architecture (backend – CakePHP, frontend – AngularJS) to a new microservice paradigm.
Participation in design of new architecture.
Development of new microservices: Frontend, FAPI, backend services.
Singlehandedly developed Email, Search, File services, integrated with GraphQL Server and frontend.
Dockerization of the project.
Participated in front-end development for system's dashboard (React.JS, Redux, Sagas).

description.text: While waiting for a project, studied and investigated new technologies: Redis, ElasticSearch, Symfony (PHP Framework), Docker, MongoDB (NoSQL databases in general), ReactJS, NodeJS. Reviewed PostgreSQL, MySQL, JavaScript.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Development of new and support of existing components for web-based tender platform for purchases by government agencies and state institutions.
Developing on custom PHP-framework SBin and Yii 2.
Gradual transfer of diverse system modules to "dockerized" SOA-based architecture.

description.text: Development of web-based CRM for real-estate industry on Yii2. Working in a team of developers.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Support and debugging of existing code base as well as development of new features and functionality.
Support of old and development of new modules, access rights management, automation tasks for transferring real estate objects from CRM database to client websites and vice versa.

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Full-stack development of new corporate websites and intranet.
Participation in developing a strategy for local corporate network infrastructure.
Webserver administration.
Development of corporate identity (branding for the entire group of companies).
Administration of web servers, virtual machines on Linux, VMWare ESXi.

description.text: VVS-arbete och badrumsrenoveringar (Plumbing work and bathroom renovations).

description.heading: Responsibilities:
items: Arbetsledarroll och hanterade ett team av rörmokare och badrumsrenoveringsspecialister. (Held supervisor role and managed a team of plumbers and bathroom renovation specialists.)
